sprint_goal.gate: From a curated route discovered on the route plan view (Sprint 01) — tapping its card or its map pin — an honest, complete curated-route detail opens; the rider can save it, find it in Saved, reopen without error, and hand off to Apple/Google Maps (web fallback).
sprint_goal.condition_text: All 9 tasks completed AND human testing gate PASS AND E2E PASS
